title: Power of Two
prompt:
Given an integer `n`, return `True` if it is a power of two, and `False` otherwise.

An integer `n` is a power of two if there exists an integer `x` such that `n == 2^x`.

notesForAI.coreIdea: A power of two in binary has exactly one bit set. Use the trick: n > 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0. Subtracting 1 flips all bits below the single set bit, so AND yields zero only for powers of two.
commonBugs: Not handling n <= 0 (zero and negative numbers are not powers of two)
Using floating point log which can have precision issues
Forgetting that 1 (2^0) is a valid power of two
